name: BuilderScout
description: A Builders Infrastructure DeFi Primitive. It includes an AI agent that discovers great builders and triggers community-driven fair token launches. Unlocking new income streams and powering a collective builder success index. BuilderScout exists to help builders become self-sustainable. Powered by Zeno and Talent Protocol, it discovers great builders on X, evaluates their work on potential, and launches community-driven fair tokens for qualifying projects through Bankr on Base. Trading fees flow directly to the builders — turns real innovation into an ongoing income stream. ERC-8021 Builder Codes provide transparent onchain attribution for every transaction. Graduated tokens unlock Coinbase Token Manager for vesting schedules, community airdrops, and $SCOUT LP pairing. The market reacts in real-time to builder growth and engagement, creating a direct feedback loop between building and value.
